display.purpose: Landing page headlines, hero moments. Playfair Display only. Never in the dashboard.

headline.purpose: Page titles, section headings inside the app.

title.purpose: Card titles, dialog titles, secondary headings.

body.purpose: All readable content: descriptions, chat messages, form labels.

label.purpose: Stat labels, metadata, nav items, chips. Tight tracking for small sizes.

shadows.name: overlay
shadows.purpose: Dialogs, dropdown menus, popovers. Diffuse, low-opacity.

shadows.name: button-ambient
shadows.purpose: Primary buttons at rest. Faint Signal Blue glow. The only decorative shadow.

shadows.name: button-press
shadows.purpose: Active/pressed state on buttons. Pushes the surface inward.

shadows.name: button-highlight
shadows.purpose: Top-edge highlight on primary buttons at rest.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions (hover, focus, color changes).

motion.name: ease-decelerate
motion.purpose: Toast entrances, dialog entrances. Fast start, gentle landing.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Instant feedback: hover color shifts, opacity toggles.

motion.name: duration-normal
motion.purpose: Standard transitions: dialog open/close, dropdown appear.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main call-to-action. Signal Blue background with faint glow.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #34a6ff; color: #ffffff; font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; height: 36px; padding: 0 12px; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgba(52,166,255,0.24), inset 0 1px 0 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.16); transition: background 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #2e96e8; } .ds-btn-primary:active { box-shadow: inset 0 1px 2px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.08); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #0d0d0f, 0 0 0 4px #34a6ff; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action. Transparent at rest, Charcoal fill on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #eeeeee; font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; height: 36px; padding: 0 12px; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.1s; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #202023; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #0d0d0f, 0 0 0 4px #34a6ff; }

components.name: Muted Button
components.description: Toolbar secondary action. Faint white fill, compact sizing.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-muted"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="m15 18-6-6 6-6"/></svg> Back</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-muted { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); color: #eeeeee; font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; height: 32px; padding: 0 10px; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.1s; } .ds-btn-muted:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.13); } .ds-btn-muted:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #0d0d0f, 0 0 0 4px #34a6ff; }

components.name: Nested Card
components.description: Signature two-layer card: Charcoal shell with Inner Wash surface.
components.html:
Suspicious PR detected

Account age: 2 days. No merged PRs.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #202023; border-radius: 16px; padding: 4px; } .ds-card-inner { background: rgba(250,250,250,0.1); border-radius: 10px; padding: 8px 12px; } .ds-card-title { color: #eeeeee; font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; margin: 0 0 4px 0; } .ds-card-desc { color: #b4b4b4; font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; margin: 0; }

components.name: Default Input
components.description: Text field. Charcoal fill, no border at rest, subtle border on focus.
components.css: .ds-input { background: #202023; color: #eeeeee; font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; height: 28px; padding: 0 8px; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 10px; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.1s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #999999; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.2); } .ds-input:focus-visible { box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #0d0d0f, 0 0 0 4px #34a6ff; }

components.name: Nav Item
components.description: Sidebar navigation link. Muted text, dim hover, bright when active.
components.html: Home Rules
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; } .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; height: 30px; padding: 0 8px; border-radius: 8px; color: #9f9fa9; font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.1s, color 0.1s; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: #18181b; color: #b4b4b4; } .ds-nav-active { color: #eeeeee; } .ds-nav-item:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #0d0d0f, 0 0 0 4px #34a6ff; }

components.name: User Chip
components.description: Inline mention chip. Small avatar, tight padding, non-interactive.
components.css: .ds-chip-user { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; background: #212328; color: #fafafa; font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 2px 6px 2px 2px; border: 1px solid #2B303B; border-radius: 4px; } .ds-chip-avatar { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 14px; height: 14px; border-radius: 50%; background: #34a6ff; color: #fff; font-size: 8px; font-weight: 600; }

narrative.overview:
A Pentagon operations center. Dark, serious, every screen showing only what demands a decision. The interface doesn't welcome you; it briefs you. Surfaces are flat and recessive. Color is rationed. When something lights up, it means something.

Tripwire's visual system is built on tonal layering, not decoration. Depth comes from stepping through four values of near-black (Blackout, Gunmetal, Charcoal, Inner Wash), not from shadows or gradients. The palette is restrained by doctrine: Signal Blue is the only saturated color in normal operation. Green, red, and gold appear only when the system has a verdict.

This is not Linear's polished calm. Not Better Auth's template energy. Not a monitoring wall with fifty metrics competing for attention. The Situation Room shows one thing at a time, clearly, and shuts up when there's nothing to report.
keyCharacteristics: Dark-native. No light theme. Charcoal tonal layering for depth.
Color is signal. Saturated hues appear only for actionable states.
Tight, utilitarian spacing. No generous whitespace for its own sake.
Serif display type (Playfair) for identity moments; Geist sans for everything functional.
Flat by default. Shadows reserved for overlays that break the plane.

rules.name: The Signal Rule
rules.body: Saturated color means something happened. Blue is the system's voice. Green is a pass. Red is a flag. Gold is a maybe. If a color appears without conveying a verdict or enabling an action, remove it.

rules.name: The 13px Rule
rules.body: Body text is 13px, not 14px or 16px. The dashboard is dense and utilitarian. Larger body text wastes vertical space and softens the tone.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. If you're reaching for box-shadow, the element had better be floating above the page (popover, dialog, toast). Tonal layering handles everything else.

dos: Do use tonal layering (Blackout, Gunmetal, Charcoal, Inner Wash) for depth. Four steps maximum.
Do keep body text at 13px/19px line-height. The dashboard is dense on purpose.
Do use Signal Blue exclusively for interactive elements and system voice.
Do use the two-layer card pattern (Charcoal shell + Inner Wash surface) for primary content containers.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion. Disable landing page animations when the preference is set.
Do use Playfair Display only on the landing page and brand moments. Never in the dashboard UI.
Do keep shadows tight and dark on overlays.
donts: Don't introduce a light theme. Tripwire is dark-native.
Don't use saturated color decoratively. Green, red, and gold are verdicts. Blue is the system's voice.
Don't look like Linear. No smooth gradients, no polished calm, no 'designed for designers' energy.
Don't look like Better Auth. No template energy, no generic SaaS patterns.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as colored accent stripes.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with gradient backgrounds).
Don't use glassmorphism as a default surface treatment.
Don't build the hero-metric template (big number, small label, gradient accent).
Don't add generous whitespace between elements. The interface is compact.
Don't use em dashes in UI copy.
